blocks.task: Investigate UPDATE bottleneck: why 67 ops/sec on 10K rows when INSERT is 30K? Profile execution
blocks.summary: Found bottleneck: UPDATE does full table scan (O(N)) even when WHERE clause matches PK index. With 10K rows, each single-row UPDATE scans all 10K. Fix: use index for UPDATE WHERE clause, like SELECT does.
blocks.details: Found bottleneck: UPDATE does full table scan (O(N)) even when WHERE clause matches PK index. With 10K rows, each single-row UPDATE scans all 10K. Fix: use index for UPDATE WHERE clause, like SELECT does.
